facebook.caption: 574 reviews. 4.5 stars. This bowl of pho at Pho Sai Gon on Phu Quoc is not flying under the radar. Locals rate it. Tourists who find it come back twice. Sit down, order fast, watch the kitchen move. Find it at 31 Đ. 30 Tháng 4, Khu 1. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
